main.description: A companion override record for a Popfeed item. This lets Bryan keep Popfeed as the source while storing better cover art and metadata in his own PDS namespace.

sourceUri.description: AT URI for the original Popfeed list item record.

sourceCollection.description: Collection name for the source record, normally social.popfeed.feed.listItem.

creativeWorkType.description: The Popfeed media type such as book, movie, or tv_show.

title.description: Title copied from the source item for easier inspection.

status.description: Override state. Approved covers are public, pending covers stay in review, and hidden suppresses the public image.

identifiers.description: Optional identifiers copied from Popfeed for lookups or later reprocessing.

image.description: Replacement artwork owned by Bryan and stored as a PDS blob.

originalUrl.description: Remote source URL used when the override image was imported.

provider.description: Provider label for the imported image, for example openlibrary.

provenance.description: Optional sync metadata for auditing or future refreshes.

review.description: Optional review metadata for queued or manually approved cover decisions.
